texto: The Way It IsThere’s a thread you follow. It goes amongthings that change. But it doesn’t change.People wonder about what you are pursuing.You have to explain about the thread.But it is hard for others to see.While you hold it you can’t get lost.Tragedies happen
explicacao: Orientação direta de people get hurtor die sobre temas ligados a motivacao. A afirmação “The Way It IsThere’s a thread you follow. It goes amongthings that change. But it doesn’t change.…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao, útil em momentos de mudanca e inspiracao.
